target.title: refactor(logging): share diagnostic message lifecycle
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a shared diagnostic message lifecycle helper for queued, processing, idle, and processed events.
- Reuse it from channel dispatch and isolated cron agent turns.
- Preserve cron final session-id adoption and dispatch processed-event behavior when session-state tracking is unavailable.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 src/logging/message-lifecycle.ts src/logging/message-lifecycle.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts`
- `fnm exec --using v24.15.0 -- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/logging/message-lifecycle.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.diagnostic-events.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `fnm exec --using v24.15.0 -- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/logging/message-lifecycle.ts src/logging/message-lifecycle.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts`
- `fnm exec --using v24.15.0 -- pnpm tsgo:core`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: removes duplicated diagnostic lifecycle emission between dispatch and isolated-cron turns after #79214.
Real environment tested: local source checkout on Node 24.15.0.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/logging/message-lifecycle.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.diagnostic-events.test.ts --reporter=dot`.
Evidence after fix: helper unit coverage passed, cron diagnostic regression coverage passed, core typecheck passed, targeted oxlint passed, autoreview returned clean.
Observed result after fix: queued, session.state processing, session.state idle, and processed events still emit for isolated cron runs, including final adopted session id handling.
What was not tested: full dispatch Vitest file; it was too slow/noisy locally, so dispatch coverage here is helper unit coverage plus core typecheck/lint over the real call site.
target.author: steipete
